properties.title: Compendium of Environmental Sustainability Indicator Collections: Rio to Johannesburg Dashboard of Sustainable Indicators
properties.description: The Rio to Johannesburg Dashboard of Sustainable Development Indicators portion of the Compendium of Environmental Sustainability Indicator Collections contains 35 Commission on Sustainable Development (CSD) indicators for 202 countries. Commonly known as the RioJo Dashboard, indicators are from the CSD Thematic Framework from the Rio Summit (1992 UN conference on the Environment and Development) to the time of the Johannesburg Summit in 2000. The data are distributed by the Columbia University Center for International Earth Science Information Network (CIESIN).
properties.purpose: To provide data to  gauge broad similarities and differences of national progress on sustainability of countries, over time and relative to other nations.
properties.authors: Consultative Group on Sustainable Development Indicators - CGSDI
properties.publishers: NASA Socioeconomic Data and Applications Center (SEDAC)
properties.citation: Consultative Group on Sustainable Development Indicators - CGSDI. 2002-12-31T00:00:00Z. Palisades, NY: NASA Socioeconomic Data and Applications Center (SEDAC). https://doi.org/10.7927/H42N506Q. Accessed [DAY MONTH YEAR].
keywords: EARTH SCIENCE > HUMAN DIMENSIONS > SUSTAINABILITY > ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
